Chapter Three

Alpha beta—gamma… then &foo; and AT&T stay alive, with numeric—dashes too.

Styled bold words and italic ones and even both at once flow as separate runs.

A quoted block sits indented in italic.

Antidisestablishmentarianismandthensomemoreletterstoforceacharacterlevelbreak supercalifragilisticexpialidocious.

Line one
line two after a hard break.
